summary: Executed backend API regression tests and frontend end-to-end flow for CAOS Memory Workbench using the public preview URL. All requested contract, profile, session, message, memory, and context preparation flows passed.

issues: No explicit inline error state is shown per action when API calls fail (actions use try/finally without catch).

action_items: Add user-visible error handling for create session/save memory/add message/prepare context API failures.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend action handlers in MemoryWorkbench.js do not include catch blocks, so request failures are not surfaced clearly to users.
Context receipt 'estimated_chars_before' is computed from already compressed history, which may underrepresent true pre-sanitization context size.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed user profiles/sessions/messages/memories in preview DB via API calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is present at /app/backend/tests/test_caos_api.py and can be reused for regression. UI flow validated on public URL with all required data-testid-driven interactions.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional defects reproduced. One initial Playwright assertion failed due strict locator resolving multiple nested dynamic spans in the receipt card; this was a selector strictness artifact, not an app integration failure.
